zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Grandmesnil於大約0990年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，他的父親Gervaise de Grandmesnil15歲，母親Countess Advis de Escalvoy12歲。他和Havoïse d'Eschauffour至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1039年6月17日在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Grandmesnil于大约0990年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯时，他的父亲Gervaise de Grandmesnil15岁，母亲Countess Advis de Escalvoy12岁。他和Havoïse d'Eschauffour至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1039年6月17日在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Grandmesnil was born about 0990, in Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Gervaise de Grandmesnil, was 15 and his mother, Countess Advis de Escalvoy, was 12. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Havoïse d'Eschauffour. He died on 17 June 1039, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Norrey, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Grandmesnil est né environ 0990, à Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Gervaise de Grandmesnil, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Countess Advis d’Escalvoy, avait 12 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Il est décédé le 17 juin 1039, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Norrey, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Grandmesnil um 0990 in Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gervaise de Grandmesnil 15 und seine Mutter Countess Advis de Escalvoy 12. Er hatte mit Havoïse d'Eschauffour mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juni 1039 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norrey, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Grandmesnil è nato il circa 0990 nel Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Gervaise de Grandmesnil, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Countess Advis de Escalvoy, aveva 12 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Morì il 17 giugno 1039, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Norrey, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Grandmesnilが約0990年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父Gervaise de Grandmesnilは15歳，母Countess Advis de Escalvoyは12歳であった。彼はHavoïse d'Eschauffourとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1039年6月17日に故郷で50歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスノリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Grandmesnil(이)가 대략 0990년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gervaise de Grandmesnil(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Advis de Escalvoy(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Havoïse d'Eschauffour(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1039년 6월 17일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 노리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Grandmesnil nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Gervaise de Grandmesnil, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Countess Advis de Escalvoy, tinha 12 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Ele faleceu em 17 de junho de 1039, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Norrey, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Grandmesnil родился около 0990 г. в местности калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gervaise de Grandmesnil было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Advis de Escalvoy, 12. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Он умер 17 июня 1039 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности норри, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Grandmesnil nació aproximadamente 0990, en Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gervaise de Grandmesnil, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Countess Advis de Escalvoy, tenía 12 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Murió el 17 de junio de 1039, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Norrey, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
